nl_query: Count revaluation extensions approved per board.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(revaluation_extension_request.id) AS approved_extensions
FROM   board b
JOIN   revaluation_extension_request re ON re.board_id = b.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = re.resulting_attempt_id
WHERE  re.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP  BY b.id
ORDER  BY approved_extensions DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): revaluation_extension_request.resulting_attempt_id, revaluation_extension_request.board_id, revaluation_extension_request.resulting_attempt_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
